user.name: Raju siruvuri

comment.body:
From Alma's weekly post I took this as the most influential for my trading this week. Been profitable:

I'm still seeing an edge in short vol trade (and intraday reversion trades on the call side, but only 1 or 2 trades at max), with a cautiously bullish short-term bias. If the VIX holds under 25 (ideally under 22) until Tuesday night, by Wednesday the dealers will be offloading a bunch of VX futures and buying ES futures. I’m not expecting a huge impact—more like some supportivness and vol crush.

comment.body: What folks need to realise is that nobody knows the future. Alma uses maths and her years of experience to work out probabilities. Some things have a high probability, some things less so. If find it remarkable how accurate she is but I don’t expect perfection because that’s ridiculous. The information she gives should help you to make trading decision, if it doesn’t you shouldn’t be here, but it’s you that presses the buy or sell button, that’s where the responsibility lies for gains or loses.
